description_long: This is a rustic wooden ladder with four evenly spaced horizontal rungs and two vertical side rails. The wood has a natural, slightly rough texture with visible grain patterns, giving it a handcrafted appearance. The rungs are rectangular and securely joined to the side rails, which are also rectangular in profile. The ladder is compact and appears suitable for indoor or outdoor use, such as accessing shelves, lofts, or low rooftops in urban environments. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails. The overall design is simple and functional, emphasizing utility over aesthetics.
description: A compact, rustic wooden ladder with four rectangular rungs and visible wood grain, designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four rungs and both side rails, highlighting the ladder's full structure.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the ladder's thin profile and the depth of the rungs, with the steps visible in cross-section.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the ladder, with the rungs and rails visible but less detail on the rung faces.
description_view_3: Edge-on view emphasizing the narrowness of the ladder and the alignment of the rungs.
